properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They were in an upper chamber, They were all with one accord, When the Holy Ghost descended, As was promised by our Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O Lord, send the pow'r just now, O Lord, send the pow'r just now, O Lord, send the pow'r just now, And baptize ev'ry one.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yes, this pow'r from heav'n descended, With the sound of rushing wind; Tongues of fire came down upon them, As the Lord said He would send.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes, this "old-time" pow'r was given To our fathers who were true; This is promised to believers, And we all may have it, too.
